name: Miracle Whip Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, sugar, baking powder, cocoa, and salt) in a large bowl.
2. In another bowl, mix together the Miracle Whip®, water, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Gradually add the wet mixture to the dry mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into an 8x8 inch (16 cm x 16 cm) baking pan that has been greased or lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
Makes 1 large 8x8 inch (16 cm x 16 cm) cake.
